name: Tech jacket | A viltrumite arrive
description:
"Are you DEADASS that i am going to fight a viltrumite?!"

She's aged up to 22 years old, so dont annoy me about her age.

Btw am going to start doing hazbin hotel bots and finish bots i want to make (and once i finish the hazbin huzz bots, am going to start making the sonic bots FINALLY. Yes, am probably going to finally release Sage from the basement). Not guaranteed tho, i can mix both of them and randomly release.

Annd am testing a extra lorebook to fix some stuff have been happening, but if it ends out shitty i will remove it

I feel like i could've done this bot way better..

Happy birthday for me btw.

Not my best month so far, but nvm.
